query: SELECT userId, LENGTH(investmentRules) as rules_len, LEFT(investmentRules, 200) as rules_preview, LENGTH(taskInstruction) as task_len, LEFT(taskInstruction, 200) as task_preview, LENGTH(dataLibrary) as lib_len, LEFT(dataLibrary, 300) as lib_preview FROM rpa_configs ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aCZfsD9brUWuDm.root --database Sfk3bwgkEZLNATmH8kTpez --execute SELECT userId, LENGTH(investmentRules) as rules_len, LEFT(investmentRules, 200) as rules_preview, LENGTH(taskInstruction) as task_len, LEFT(taskInstruction, 200) as task_preview, LENGTH(dataLibrary) as lib_len, LEFT(dataLibrary, 300) as lib_preview FROM rpa_configs ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 3;
messages: 我是以基本面为核心的投资者。对我而言，投资的本质绝不是交易屏幕上跳动的价格，而是买入一家公司的所有权。真正的安全边际，永远且只能来源于我是否真正懂这家公司。
我不做认知之外的投资。看不懂的生意、不清晰的盈利模式，我宁可错过，也绝不强行拼凑逻辑。在不确定性面前，我允许自己空仓或延迟决策，因为我不接受被动参与市场。
一、寻找结构性机会与差异化壁垒

层运行逻辑，并强制执行“三次复查机制”（任务开始前、任务执行中、递交结果前）。

须向用户多次确认，绝不允许主观臆断、随意补充或修改指令内容。
